2606.21641.title: When Is an LLM Worth It for Hyperparameter Optimization? A Budget-Matched Study on Tabular Data Finds the Warm-Start Is a Default Configuration, Not the Model
2606.21641.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as hyperparameter-optimization (HPO) advisors that "warm-start" search from prior knowledge, proposing strong configurations in very few evaluations. We test that claim under a budget-matched, multi-seed protocol on eight PMLB tabular benchmarks, comparing an LLM advisor (LLM-OptFlow) against four classical baselines (random search, Optuna-TPE, Gaussian-process Bayesian optimization, and successive halving) over one shared search space, with paired tests and bootstrap 95% CIs across 8 x 5 = 40 (task, seed) units. The finding is cautionary. The advisor's strong first point is not an LLM output at all: like prior LLM-HPO systems the loop is seeded with a fixed default configuration, evaluated before any model call, which alone reaches 88.7% mean best-CV, identical to within 0.01 pp across all seven advisor models tested. The LLM's own proposals add only +0.40 pp of cross-validation accuracy over that seed and nothing on held-out test (LLM-Default = -0.01 pp, p = 0.92). When the same seed is granted to classical search, the apparent lead collapses: against seeded random search it leads by +0.20 pp at 2 evaluations, is tied by 5, and is behind by 12 (-0.37 pp). Without the seed, classical search ties the advisor by 12 evaluations and beats it by 40 (+0.6 to +0.8 pp, p <= 1e-4). Two LLM-specific behaviors survive: a single-task exploration failure (vehicle), and a rule-based confidence filter that removes ~33% of wasted compute without changing accuracy. The recommendation is deflationary: on tabular HPO, seed classical search with a sensible default; an LLM advisor adds no measurable generalization benefit and is overtaken within a handful of evaluations. We release the harness and a script that reproduces every statistic.
2606.21641.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）被提出作為超參數優化（HPO）顧問，從先前的知識中「熱啟動」搜索，在極少的評估中提出強大的配置。<lb/>我們在八個 PMLB 表格基準上，根據預算匹配的多種種子協議測試該聲明，將 LLM 顧問（LLM-OptFlow）與四個經典基準（隨機搜索、Optuna-TPE、高斯過程貝葉斯優化和逐步減半）進行比較，這些基準在一個共享的搜索空間中，進行配對測試並在 8 x 5 = 40（任務，種子）單位上進行自助法 95% 置信區間的計算。<lb/>結果令人警惕。顧問的強大第一點根本不是 LLM 的輸出：與先前的 LLM-HPO 系統類似，這個循環是用固定的默認配置進行初始化，在任何模型調用之前進行評估，這單獨達到了 88.7% 的平均最佳交叉驗證，與所有七個測試的顧問模型之間的差異不超過 0.01 百分點。<lb/>LLM 自己的提議僅在該種子上增加了 +0.40 百分點的交叉驗證準確率，而在保留的測試中沒有任何增益（LLM-Default = -0.01 百分點，p = 0.92）。<lb/>當同樣的種子被賦予經典搜索時，明顯的領先地位崩潰：與種子隨機搜索相比，在 2 次評估中領先 +0.20 百分點，在 5 次時平手，而在 12 次時落後 -0.37 百分點。<lb/>沒有種子的情況下，經典搜索在 12 次評估中與顧問平手，並在 40 次評估中超過顧問 (+0.6 到 +0.8 百分點，p <= 1e-4)。<lb/>兩種 LLM 特有的行為仍然存在：單一任務探索失敗（車輛），以及一種基於規則的信心過濾器，該過濾器在不改變準確率的情況下去除約 33% 的浪費計算。<lb/>建議是貶值的：在表格 HPO 上，使用合理的默認值來種子經典搜索；LLM 顧問沒有增加可測量的泛化效益，並在幾次評估內被超越。<lb/>我們發布了這個工具和一個重現每個統計數據的腳本。
2606.21641.author: Carson Rodrigues et.al.
